files.content:
import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "reportId": string;
  "title": string;
  "owner": string;
  "category": string;
  "revenue": number;
  "updated": string;
  "external": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Reports",
  "description": "Click an underlined value to drill into its detail view.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 10,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": false,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": true,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "reportId",
      "label": "Report #",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "underline": true,
      "clickAction": {
        "type": "route-same",
        "urlTemplate": "/reports/{reportId}"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "title",
      "label": "Title",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "underline": true,
      "clickAction": {
        "type": "dialog"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "owner",
      "label": "Owner",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "category",
      "label": "Category",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Finance": "default",
        "Marketing": "secondary",
        "Ops": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "revenue",
      "label": "Revenue",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "updated",
      "label": "Updated",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "external",
      "label": "Source",
      "type": "link",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "underline": true,
      "clickAction": {
        "type": "route-new",
        "urlTemplate": "{external}"
      }
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
